failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result. It treated two prices above 233.90 as if they were below the minimum price, producing an incorrect negative answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The agent correctly planned and invoked ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned two matching items with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both above 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
